author: doll-agent
content: Added 5 d2_* metrics: d2_absolute_error_score (regression.rs, median baseline), d2_pinball_score (alpha-quantile baseline), d2_tweedie_score (Tweedie deviance with mean baseline), d2_brier_score (binary, prior baseline), d2_log_loss_score (multiclass, prior matrix baseline). All wired in lib.rs.
